doctrine.source: Local Instacart item export; raw CSV remains uncommitted.
doctrine.purpose: Unsalted butter alias unlock after accepting the USDA Butter, without salt anchor.
hold_notes: Dry rice package names remain held rather than aliased to cooked rice.
Country Crock dairy-free butter remains held because it is not dairy butter.
Vanilla extract, mint, lemon grass, and salt remain held for later refinement.

aliases.alias: kerrygold grass fed unsalted butter sticks
aliases.reason: Brand and stick packaging do not change plain unsalted dairy butter identity.
Store-brand plain unsalted dairy butter routes to the USDA unsalted butter anchor.
